name: ics
when_to_use: 交付「点一下加进日历」的事件/邀请/课表/循环日程(.ics 下载或邮件附件)时用它,而非手写 iCalendar 文本;单纯在网页里展示日历 UI 请用目录里的 fullcalendar-core/toast-ui-calendar,它不做渲染只产文件。
why_valuable: 日历 App 对畸形 .ics 是静默拒绝导入。RFC5545 有 75 字节行折叠(line folding)、字符转义、必填 UID/DTSTAMP、RRULE 循环规则、VALARM 提醒、ATTENDEE 等硬约束,原生 AI 手写常年在折叠/转义/RRULE 上翻车导致导入失败。ics 用 yup 校验 + 正确折叠把这些固化。

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-writing iCalendar text to deliver events, invitations, class schedules, or recurring schedules that users can add to a calendar with one click (.ics download or email attachment). To display a calendar UI on a web page, use fullcalendar-core/toast-ui-calendar from the catalog; this package only generates files and does not render.
en.why_valuable: Calendar apps silently refuse malformed .ics imports. RFC5545 has hard constraints including 75-byte line folding, character escaping, required UID/DTSTAMP, RRULE recurrence, VALARM reminders, and ATTENDEE; AI-written output routinely fails on folding, escaping, or RRULE and cannot be imported. ics fixes these with yup validation and correct folding.

data_in.note: start/end are arrays [year,month,day,hour,minute] (local time), not Date objects; supply exactly one of end or duration, and omitting both is an error. The return value is {error, value}; always inspect error before consumption. recurrenceRule is a direct RFC5545 RRULE string.

schema.duration?: { hours?:number, minutes?:number, days?:number, weeks?:number } -- mutually exclusive with end
schema.uid?: string -- generated by nanoid when omitted

data_in.note: start/end 是数组 [年,月,日,时,分](本地),不是 Date 对象;end 与 duration 二选一,两者都缺必报错。返回 {error, value},消费前必须查 error。recurrenceRule 直接给 RFC5545 RRULE 字符串。

schema.start: [number,number,number,number,number] —— 必填,[年,月,日,时,分](也接受 number 毫秒 / string)
schema.duration?: { hours?:number, minutes?:number, days?:number, weeks?:number } —— 与 end 二选一
schema.end?: [年,月,日,时,分] —— 与 duration 二选一
schema.uid?: string —— 缺省由 nanoid 生成

provides._note: headless-primitive:纯 JS 文本生成器,不渲染;value 是可直接下载/附件的 .ics 字符串。
provides.outputs: RFC5545 合规 .ics 文本:正确的 75 字节行折叠、值转义、必填 UID/DTSTAMP、RRULE/EXDATE、VALARM、ORGANIZER/ATTENDEE。

api_surface.multi: createEvents(events, headerAttributes?) → { error, value }(可设 productId/calName/method)

peer.note: 无渲染依赖;value 直接 new Blob([value], {type:'text/calendar'}) 触发下载,或作邮件附件。

boot.note: 具名导出 {createEvent, createEvents, createEventsAsync}。返回对象须先查 error 再用 value。start/end 是 [y,m,d,h,min] 数组不是 Date;end 与 duration 缺一必错。多事件用 createEvents([...], { productId, calName })。yup/nanoid/runes2 均纯 JS,浏览器直接跑。

isolation.evidence: +esm 具名导出 {convertTimestampToArray,createEvent,createEvents,createEventsAsync,isValidURL} + default。index.d.ts:createEvent(attributes)→{error:Error|null,value:string|null},EventAttributes 要求 start 且 (end|duration) 二选一,recurrenceRule 为 RRULE 字符串。依赖 yup(校验)/nanoid(UID)/runes2(字素折叠)全为纯 JS,零 document/window 访问。纯字符串生成 → 天然 shadow-safe。
